title: NetPulse Ingestor (Network Telemetry Pipeline)
description: A high-throughput, event-driven telemetry pipeline designed to ingest and stream real-time device status payloads, minimizing data parsing overhead and isolating network latency bottlenecks via Go consumer services.

title: Chopped (AI Recipe Application)
description: An AI-integrated mobile application that leverages GraphQL and Apollo Client to scrape, parse, and manage recipe data directly from YouTube video transcripts. Features complex frontend-mobile state management and optimized backend queries for single-recipe data fetching.

title: CivicCase Tracker
description: An AI-powered municipal issue tracker utilizing a decoupled Next.js and GraphQL architecture. Integrated Gemini 2.5 Flash and LangGraph to deploy an autonomous AI agent capable of auto-categorizing resident complaints and querying live MongoDB data to answer community status questions.

title: Property Management System
description: A centralized management platform for landlords, tenants, and contractors. Engineered with a Node.js/Express backend and MongoDB. Features role-based Auth0 security, automated SendGrid email triggers for lease expirations, and Socket.io for real-time messaging between stakeholders.

title: Spare (formerly Portfolio Pulse)
description: A mobile finance application that connects securely to banking institutions via the Plaid API to track spending and round up spare change. Utilizes a React Native frontend communicating with an Apollo GraphQL server, leveraging Prisma ORM and PostgreSQL for robust, heavily-typed financial data management.

title: Bicycle Theft Predictor
description: A Machine Learning application designed to predict the likelihood of a stolen bicycle being recovered by the Toronto Police Service. Using historical data from the Toronto Police Public Safety Data Portal, the system analyzes factors such as bike cost, location type (premises), and occurrence time to classify theft cases. This tool aims to help law enforcement prioritize cases with higher recovery probability and help citizens understand risk factors.
